creator: giacomomariani@yahoo.it
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/devel/clewn/
#	/usr/ports/devel/clewn/distinfo
#	/usr/ports/devel/clewn/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-plist
#
echo c - /usr/ports/devel/clewn/
mkdir -p /usr/ports/devel/clewn/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/devel/clewn/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/devel/clewn/distinfo <<
'END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/distinfo' XMD5 (clewn-1.14.tar.gz) =
aa486604101d60930ea4cb76498be81f XSHA256 (clewn-1.14.tar.gz) =
f797b625371a34c9ed9404da911eb765f62b2513c4802629ab51bd99e84ec56f XSIZE
(clewn-1.14.tar.gz) = 200844 END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/distinfo
echo x - /usr/ports/devel/clewn/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/devel/clewn/Makefile <<
'END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/Makefile' X# New ports collection
makefile for:   clewn X# Date created:                21 Oct 2008
X# Whom:                        Giacomo Mariani
<giacomomariani_at_yahoo_dot_it> X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      clewn
XPORTVERSION=   1.14
XCATEGORIES=    devel
XMASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE_EXTENDED}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=clewn
X
XMAINTAINER=    giacomomariani@yahoo.it
XCOMMENT=       Clewn provides Gdb support within Vim
X
XRUN_DEPENDS=   vim>=6.3:${PORTSDIR}/editors/vim
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE= yes
XUSE_GMAKE=     yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/Makefile
echo x - /usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-descr <<
'END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-descr' XClewn implements full gdb
support in the vim editor: breakpoints, Xwatch variables, gdb command
completion, assembly windows, etc. X
XClewn is a program controlling vim through the netBeans socket
interface, Xit runs concurrently with vim and talks to vim. 
XClewn can only be used with gvim, the graphical implementation of vim, 
Xas vim on a terminal does not support netBeans.
X
XWWW: http://clewn.sourceforge.net/index.html
END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-descr
echo x - /usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-plist <<
'END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-plist' Xbin/clewn
Xshare/vim/vimfiles/clewn.vim
Xshare/vim/vimfiles/.clewn_keys
Xshare/vim/vimfiles/doc/clewn.txt
Xshare/vim/vimfiles/doc/tags
Xshare/vim/vimfiles/macros/clewn_mappings.vim
Xshare/vim/vimfiles/syntax/gdbvar.vim
X@dirrm share/vim/vimfiles/macros
X@dirrm share/vim/vimfiles/doc
X@dirrm share/vim/vimfiles/syntax
X@dirrm share/vim/vimfiles
END-of-/usr/ports/devel/clewn/pkg-plist
exit
